eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Nance, NE; at 9:10 AM on JUN 11, 2026 Effective until 2:10 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: WATER EMERGENCY- Absolutely no water use in the city of Genoa. There is a main water break, with a minimal supply coming to town. Please no sprinklers or excessive water use. We are working on a solution for drinking water. Avoid N. Jaguar Rd. Contact local officials with any questions.
